comments: Axlura was built specifically to help EU small businesses comply with the European Accessibility Act (EAA), which has been enforced since June 2025. The tool combines automated axe-core scanning with AI-powered remediation guidance and legal documentation generation.
features: Axlura scans websites for WCAG 2.1 AA violations using axe-core, provides AI-powered fix instructions with before/after code, generates EAA  Accessibility Statements, and monitors sites weekly. Designed for EU businesses to reduce EAA compliance risk.
title: Axlura
